Detect variable types in a data.frame

Source: R/helpers.R
detect_var_types.Rd

Classifies each column as "continuous" or "categorical" based on class and number of unique values.

Usage

detect_var_types(data, max_levels = 5L)

Arguments

data

a data.frame

max_levels

integer; numeric columns with at most this many unique values are treated as categorical. Default: 5.

Value

named character vector with entries "continuous" or "categorical", one per column

Author

Matthias Templ

Examples

detect_var_types(iris)
#>  Sepal.Length   Sepal.Width  Petal.Length   Petal.Width       Species 
#>  "continuous"  "continuous"  "continuous"  "continuous" "categorical"
